caption: Visual tool registry API documentation layout showing four MCP tool cards in 2x2 grid: search_chunks with query string and top_k int returning ChunkResult array, validate_slide with content JSON returning ValidationResult, check_novelty with deck_id UUID and text string returning NoveltyScore, commit_slide with deck_id UUID and slide JSON returning SlideRecord, each card with distinct icon in dark Swagger UI inspired design
alt_text: Four MCP tool cards in grid layout showing function signatures for search_chunks, validate_slide, check_novelty, and commit_slide with types and return values
